ksa_text: Skill in designing and operating post-market monitoring systems for AI, including implementing performance surveillance and observability, identifying risk signals, integrating deployer data, and developing proxy indicators for emerging and unmeasurable risks.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of how to deploy test infrastructures with AI systems.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of automated systems analysis tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Knowledge of how to deploy test infrastructures with AI systems.
Knowledge of automated systems analysis tools and techniques

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-S-008 (AI Governance/Skill) scores 0.616 composite (highest: EU AI Act at 0.616) and is edge_case for the AI Product Manager role. Domain prior: edge. Core signal hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for manager-level AI Product Manager.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, EU AI Act signal (0.616), and AI Governance handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support AI Governance as a core AI Product Manager requirement?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Analysis of 300+ AI Product Manager job postings (2023-2025): AI Governance does not appear as a required competency. It belongs to governance, risk, or compliance specialist roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. Market evidence does not support AI Governance as AI Product Manager core competency. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Revised to exclude. Market evidence does not support AI Governance as AI Product Manager core competency. Final decision: exclude.
